response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed video structure: Introduction (00:00-01:07), Promotion (01:07-02:56), Performance (02:56-05:01). Identified the main song 'Figure It Out' performed by Pavolia Reine at 02:56 via on-screen text. Performed search 'Pavolia Reine "Figure It Out" lyrics' and retrieved full lyrics. Since the song is in English, original and translated lyrics are the same.
response.global_summary: The video starts with an introductory segment by VTuber Pavolia Reine about her membership, followed by a promotional segment titled 'The Royaltea', and concludes with a live performance of her song 'Figure It Out'.

scenes.description: Pavolia Reine talks about her membership and presents a promotional segment for 'The Royaltea'.
Pavolia Reine performs her song 'Figure It Out' in a live concert setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey (Never, never, never gonna figure it out)
Hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey (Never gonna figure it out)

[Verse 1]
Wake up, another bloody Monday
Say things I never wanted to say
Up in arms, who can I please? You?
Livin' day by day
(Oh)
Wake up, another bloody Monday
(Oh)
Rinse and repeat until it’s Sunday
(Oh)
Hold it, so frustrating
Ya know, I can't do it no more

[Pre-Chorus]
I'll say
No good, down to the core
Here you, now I can't be
Din' down my door

[Chorus]
Yeah
I'll shout, scream and shout
But I'll never change it now
I'm just too much, but not enough
To please you right
(I'll say)
Your idea, of ideal
That you're screaming in my hair
I'm just so broken
Yeah

[Outro]
Never, never, never gonna figure it out
Never, never, never gonna figure it out
